landing.title: Tools that run in your browser
landing.description: A collection of serverless web utilities. Your files never leave your device.

mochi.name: Mochi
mochi.description: Shrink the pixel size of your images right in the browser. No uploads, no server.

metaimg.name: Metaimg
metaimg.description: Read, edit or strip EXIF metadata from your JPEG photos. All in your browser.

convy.name: Convy
convy.description: Convert between PNG, JPG and WebP with quality control. All in your browser, no uploads.

pixely.name: Pixely
pixely.description: Apply a pixel-art effect to your image by adjusting the block size. Live preview. All in your browser.

createpass.name: Createpass
createpass.description: Create random passwords using browser cryptography. They never leave your device.

hashy.name: Hashy
hashy.description: SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384 and SHA-512 of text or files. Compare against an expected hash to verify downloads.

idkun.name: Idkun
idkun.description: UUID v4, UUID v7, UUID NIL, ULID and NanoID. Cryptographically secure generation in your browser.

stapler.name: Stapler
stapler.description: Combine several PDF files into a single one, in any order. Everything is processed in your browser.

wordy.name: Wordy
wordy.description: Analyze text or a text file: words, characters, lines, paragraphs and estimated reading time.

scissor.name: Scissor
scissor.description: Pick pages or ranges from a PDF and download them as a new file. Everything in your browser.

pdfspinner.name: PdfSpinner
pdfspinner.description: Rotate all pages or a specific range by 90°, 180° or 270°. All in your browser.

albumy.name: Albumy
albumy.tagline: Turn multiple images into one PDF
albumy.description: Load several images, reorder them, and download them as a single PDF. A4, Letter or page sized to each image. All in your browser.

metapdf.name: Metapdf
metapdf.description: Read and modify title, author, subject, keywords and dates of a PDF. All in your browser.

combiny.name: Combiny
combiny.description: Generate combinations of multiple fields with a configurable separator and suffix. Handy for email lists, usernames, slugs or IDs.

csvjson.name: CsvJson
csvjson.description: Paste CSV or JSON and get the other format instantly. Auto-detects the delimiter and format. All in your browser.

lorempad.name: Lorempad
lorempad.description: Placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences or words. Option to start with the classic "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet…" and output as plain text or HTML.

qrgen.name: Qrgen
qrgen.description: Create QR codes for URLs or text. Customize color, size, error-correction level and download as SVG or PNG.

regexpad.name: Regexpad
regexpad.description: Build a regular expression, see matches highlighted, and apply a replacement (supports $1, $2…). All in your browser.

yamljson.name: YamlJson
yamljson.description: Paste YAML or JSON and get the other format instantly. Auto-detects format and shows errors with line and column. All in your browser.

urlpad.name: Urlpad
urlpad.description: Encode or decode text and URLs. Auto-detection and two variants (full URI or component). All in your browser.

codecpad.name: Codecpad
codecpad.tagline: Encode text in multiple formats at once
codecpad.description: UTF-8, Base64, Base64 URL-safe, Base32, Hex and Base58. Edit any format and the rest update instantly.

jwtdecoder.name: JwtDecoder
jwtdecoder.description: Paste a JWT to see its header and payload pretty-printed, validity status, and standard claims (exp, iat, nbf…) interpreted.

diffy.name: Diffy
diffy.tagline: Compare two texts and highlight changes
diffy.description: Diff by lines, words or characters with highlighting. Options to ignore case or whitespace. All in your browser.

gradienty.name: Gradienty
gradienty.description: Build linear, radial and conic gradients with multiple stops, see a live preview, and copy the CSS.

shadowy.name: Shadowy
shadowy.description: Shadows with offset, blur, spread, color, alpha and inset. Multiple layers with live preview.

colory.name: Colory
colory.tagline: Color picker, palette and WCAG contrast
colory.description: Pick a color, convert between HEX/RGB/HSL, generate a palette and measure WCAG contrast against white and black.

unity.name: Unity
unity.description: Convert between px, rem, em, pt and % using a configurable base size. Editing any unit recalculates the rest.

timely.name: Timely
timely.description: Edit any format (UNIX seconds/ms, ISO 8601 UTC/local, RFC 2822) and the others update. Shows weekday, relative time and timezone.

basey.name: Basey
basey.description: Convert between binary, octal, decimal and hexadecimal. Supports integers of any size (BigInt).

lapsy.name: Lapsy
lapsy.description: Calculate the time between two dates or from a date until now (live). Shows years, months, days, hours, minutes and seconds.

picky.name: Picky
picky.description: Load an image, hover to inspect and click to pick a color. HEX, RGB and HSL with copy-to-clipboard. All in your browser.

markpdf.name: Markpdf
markpdf.description: Add a text watermark to PDF pages with customizable color, opacity, size, angle and position (including tiled pattern). All in your browser.

jsonpad.name: Jsonpad
jsonpad.description: Paste JSON, validate it and pretty-print with the indent you like. Minify, sort keys and see stats. All in your browser.

addCustom.title: Add a custom base
addCustom.label: Radix
addCustom.hint: Digits run 0-9, then a-z. For example, base 36 uses 0-9 and a-z.

errors.invalidRadix: Radix must be an integer between 2 and 36.

unity.baseHint: 1rem = base. 1em = relative to parent (here assumed = base). 1pt = 1.333px (96dpi).

diffy.empty: Paste two texts above to compare.

jwtdecoder.signatureHint: The signature is opaque: verifying it requires the issuer's key or certificate.

errors.INVALID_FORMAT: A JWT must have 3 parts separated by dots.

errors.nonRepresentable: Bytes are not representable in this format

variant.label: Variant
variant.componentHint: encodeURIComponent / decodeURIComponent. Escapes everything except letters, digits, and -_.!~*'(). Use it for query param values.
variant.uriHint: encodeURI / decodeURI. Preserves reserved chars like /, :, ?, #, &. Use it for a complete URL.

errors.unknownInput: Could not detect the format. Pick the direction manually.

regexpad.replacementHint: Use $& for the whole match, $1, $2… for capture groups.
regexpad.sourcePlaceholder: Paste the text you want to search here…
regexpad.previewEmpty: Type some text above to see matches.
regexpad.outputPlaceholder: The text with the replacement applied will appear here.

qrgen.empty: Enter some text above to generate the QR.
qrgen.errorLevelHint: Higher correction keeps the QR readable when damaged or partially covered, at the cost of more density.

lorempad.classic: Start with "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet…"

errors.unknownInput: Could not detect the format. Pick the direction manually.
errors.notTabular: JSON must be an array (or object) to convert to CSV.
errors.mixedShape: The array mixes element types. It must be all objects or all arrays.

fields.title: Fields
fields.examples: e.g. Maria|e.g. Perez|e.g. Acme|e.g. 2024|e.g. dev|e.g. eu

options.permuteHint: When enabled, also generates combinations with fields in different orders (last.first, etc.).
options.subsetsHint: When enabled, also generates variants using only some of the filled fields (just first name, just last name, first+company, etc.).
options.downloadOnlyHint: Useful when there are thousands of combinations and drawing the list slows the browser. Raises the cap to 100,000 results.

results.title: Results ({count})
results.empty: Fill in at least one field to generate combinations.
results.downloadHint: List hidden to avoid slowing down the browser. Press Download to get a .txt with all {count} combinations.

metapdf.dropzone: Drag a PDF here or click to select one

errors.invalidPdf: {name} is not a valid PDF or is corrupted.

albumy.dropzone: Drag images here or click to select them

options.title: PDF options
options.qualityHint: JPEG and PNG are embedded as-is. Other formats (WebP, GIF, etc.) are re-encoded to JPEG at this quality.

pdfspinner.dropzone: Drag a PDF here or click to select one
pdfspinner.hint: Separate with commas, use dashes for ranges. Empty rotates every page. Rotations stack on top of the current rotation.

errors.invalidPdf: {name} is not a valid PDF or is corrupted.

scissor.dropzone: Drag a PDF here or click to select one
scissor.hint: Separate with commas. Use dashes for ranges (1-5). All pages are preselected by default.

errors.invalidPdf: {name} is not a valid PDF or is corrupted.

wordy.textPlaceholder: Paste or type the text to analyze…
wordy.dropzone: Drag a text file (.txt, .md, .csv…) or click to select one

errors.notText: Only plain-text files (.txt, .md, .csv, etc.) are supported.

stapler.dropzone: Drag PDFs here or click to select them

errors.invalidPdf: {name} is not a valid PDF or is corrupted.

errors.noCharset: Pick at least one character type.

about.uuidv4: The most common standard UUID. 122 random bits. RFC 4122.
about.uuidv7: Combines timestamp + random. Lexicographically sortable. RFC 9562 (2024).
about.uuidNil: The nil UUID, all zeros. Useful as a default or sentinel value.
about.ulid: Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifier. 26 chars in Crockford Base32.
about.nanoid: Short and popular URL-safe identifier. Configurable size.

hashy.textPlaceholder: Paste or type text to hash…
hashy.dropzone: Drag a file here or click to select one

verify.label: Verify against an expected hash
verify.placeholder: Paste the hex hash (40, 64, 96 or 128 chars)…
verify.unknownLength: Unrecognized length. Must match SHA-1 (40), SHA-256 (64), SHA-384 (96) or SHA-512 (128).

markpdf.dropzone: Drag a PDF here or click to select one
markpdf.rangesHint: Use numbers, ranges (1-3) or comma-separated lists.

errors.encrypted: This PDF is encrypted and cannot be modified.
errors.emptyText: Type some text for the watermark.

picky.dropzone: Drag an image here or click to select one
picky.hint: Hover to preview and click to pick a color.

pixely.dropzone: Drag an image here or click to select one

selection.label: Selected area
selection.hint: Drag on the image to pixelate just one region.

convy.dropzone: Drag an image here or click to select one
convy.qualityHintLossless: PNG is lossless and has no quality control.

metaimg.dropzone: Drag a JPEG here or click to select one

tags.title: Detected metadata ({count})
tags.hint: Each tag shows its name, IFD and type. Edit the value, remove with × or add new tags.
tags.empty: This image has no EXIF metadata.

custom.invalidId: ID must be an integer between 1 and 65535.
custom.duplicate: That tag already exists in the image.

footer.tagline: Tanukibox · tools that run in your browser

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Tanukibox we believe your files are yours. That's why all our tools run entirely in your browser: the images, PDFs, text or any file you process never leave your device.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.body: This policy applies to tanukibox.com and every tool hosted under this domain. It describes what information is collected when you visit the site and what we do with it.

data.title: 2. Data we collect
data.body:
We don't have a server that receives your files. The tools (Mochi, Metaimg, Createpass, Hashy, etc.) process data right in your browser using native APIs (Canvas, Web Crypto, etc.). Therefore:

  • We do not collect the files you process, their contents or the results.
  • There are no user accounts, passwords or profiles.
  • The Tanukibox server only delivers the static assets of the site (HTML, CSS, JS).

The only thing stored is described in the Cookies section.

cookies.title: 3. Cookies and local storage
cookies.body:
We use a single technical cookie called tanukibox_lang to remember your language preference. It does not identify the user and is not shared with third parties.

More details in the cookies policy.

tracking.title: 4. Analytics and advertising
tracking.body: We don't use analytics or display advertising at the moment. If in the future we integrate services like Google AdSense or an analytics provider, this policy will be updated to reflect it and your consent will be requested when the law requires it (GDPR/EU).

gdpr.title: 5. Your rights (GDPR)
gdpr.body:
Since we don't store personally identifiable information on our servers, most rights of the GDPR (access, rectification, erasure, portability) don't apply because there's no data to apply them to.

Even so, you can exercise any right by contacting us at the address listed at the bottom of this policy.

children.title: 6. Children
children.body: The site is not directed at children under 14. We do not knowingly collect data about minors.

changes.title: 7. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy when we add new features or for legal reasons. The date of the last update is shown in the document header.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Welcome to Tanukibox. By using this site you accept the conditions described below. If you don't agree, please do not use the service.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance
acceptance.body: Accessing and using tanukibox.com implies full acceptance of these terms. They may be updated at any time; continued use after the changes implies their acceptance.

service.title: 2. Service description
service.body: Tanukibox provides a set of utilities that run entirely in your browser (local processing). The service is provided free of charge and "as is", with no guarantees of availability, accuracy or fitness for a particular purpose.

use.title: 3. Permitted use
use.body:
You may use the tools for any lawful purpose, personal or professional. You may not:

  • Attempt to compromise the security or availability of the site.
  • Use the service to process illegal content.
  • Copy or redistribute the site code without authorization.

responsibility.title: 4. User responsibility
responsibility.body: You are responsible for validating the results of each tool before making decisions based on them. For example, manually verifying a hash, checking a generated password in a trusted manager, or reviewing the metadata removed before publishing an image.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual property
ip.body: The Tanukibox name, logo and site design are the property of its author. The source code may be available under an open license in its public repository; check the repository for the exact terms.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Tanukibox shall not be liable for direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service, including data loss.

changes.title: 7. Modifications
changes.body: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue any tool at any time without prior notice.

jurisdiction.title: 8. Applicable law and jurisdiction
jurisdiction.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the courts and tribunals of the user's domicile, or of Madrid if the user is not a consumer.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.intro: This page describes which cookies and storage mechanisms tanukibox.com uses.

what.title: 1. What cookies are
what.body: Cookies are small files a website stores on your device to remember information between visits (preferences, session, etc.). Tanukibox uses the bare minimum.

used.title: 2. Cookies we use
used.body:
• tanukibox_lang — technical preference cookie. Stores the selected language so we don't ask on every visit. Expires in 1 year. Does not identify the user.

We don't use tracking or advertising cookies at this time.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-party cookies
thirdParty.body: Tanukibox currently doesn't load third-party scripts that install cookies. If in the future we integrate services like Google AdSense or an analytics tool, this section will be updated and your consent will be requested via a banner.

manage.title: 4. How to manage cookies
manage.body: You can delete or block cookies from your browser settings. If you block tanukibox_lang, the site will work but won't remember your language preference.

changes.title: 5. Changes to this policy
changes.body: If we add new cookies or third-party services, we'll update this page and the header date.
